programs.title: Extreme Loggers
programs.desc: An interesting series of meetings with people performing one of the most dangerous professions in the world - lumberjacks.To pursue this profession, you must demonstrate certain character traits.You have to be tough, strong and determined.According to statistics from the USA, there are 21 times more cases of death at work in this profession than in other occupations.In the program, we get to know both family businesses that have been cutting down trees for years, as well as huge corporations.We watch as masters of this profession face difficult challenges in the most hostile places on earth.

programs.title: A2 - Abenteuer Autobahn
programs.desc: The motorway from Berlin to Dortmund is one of the busiest roads in Germany.In the program, we meet the people who make the route connecting the east with the west function perfectly.

programs.title: Wheeler Dealers 15
programs.desc: A program for lovers of old cars.In each episode, Mike Brewer and Ant Anstead struggle to restore a damaged vehicle.Their goal is to renovate and sell a used car at a profit.

programs.title: You will be pleased 4
programs.desc: The presenters visit car repair shops with a hidden camera to watch the mechanics work.Krzysztof Woroniecki evaluates their activities and also suggests how to remove simple faults yourself.
